title: storage — workspace + user settings
description: Workspace-facing preferences resolved via the settings module's #[AsSetting] classes. Distinct from config('storage.*') (deployment-owned). Every setting is scoped to a workspace + optionally per-user.

groups.label: File storage
groups.description: Configure how your workspace handles file uploads, retention, and sharing.

fields.name: storage_retention_overrides
fields.label: Custom retention per file kind
fields.help_text: Override the platform default retention for specific file kinds. Cannot shorten below compliance minimums.

fields.name: archive_on_replace
fields.label: Archive files on replace
fields.help_text: When a file is replaced (single=true attachment), archive the old file for the retention window instead of hard-deleting immediately.

fields.name: share_links_enabled
fields.label: Allow external share links
fields.help_text: Workspace admins can issue signed URLs with the `share` reason. Rejects if disabled.

fields.name: share_max_ttl_days
fields.label: Max share link duration (days)
fields.help_text: Cap on share-reason TTL. Global limit is 7 days.

fields.name: ip_locked_share_required
fields.label: Require IP lock on share links
fields.help_text: Every share-reason signed URL must specify a CIDR IP lock.

fields.name: strip_exif_gps
fields.label: Strip location data from image uploads
fields.help_text: Removes GPS coordinates from photo EXIF data on upload.

fields.name: strip_pdf_metadata
fields.label: Strip PDF metadata
fields.help_text: Removes Author/Producer/Creator fields from PDF uploads.

fields.name: storage_region
fields.label: Storage region
fields.help_text: Where your files are stored. Changing this triggers a data-migration operation.

notes: The `storage_region` setting is a WRITE-ONCE-AT-PROVISIONING-TIME field for most tiers. Changing it after uploads exist triggers a background data-migration operation + potentially incurs migration cost. Enterprise workspaces can request the change via a support ticket.
